# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

@Library('shared-library') _

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', description: 'Comma-separated list of artifact URLs to download', defaultValue: ''),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TARGETS', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers', defaultValue: ''),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_PATH', description: 'Target deployment path on servers', defaultValue: '/opt/app/'),
        choice(name: 'ARTIFACT_TYPE', choices: ['jar', 'war', 'zip', 'tar.gz', 'docker'], description: 'Type of artifact'),
        booleanParam(name: 'BACKUP_EXISTING', description: 'Backup existing artifacts before deployment', defaultValue: true),
        booleanParam(name: 'VALIDATE_CHECKSUM', description: 'Validate artifact checksums', defaultValue: true),
        string(name: 'CHECKSUM_URLS', description: 'Comma-separated list of checksum file URLs (optional)', defaultValue: ''),
        choice(name: 'CHECKSUM_ALGORITHM', choices: ['SHA256', 'SHA1', 'MD5'], description: 'Checksum algorithm'),
        string(name: 'S3_BUCKET', description: 'S3 bucket name (for S3 URLs)', defaultValue: ''),
        string(name: 'AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID', description: 'AWS credentials ID', defaultValue: 'aws-credentials'),
        string(name: 'ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID', description: 'Artifactory credentials ID', defaultValue: 'artifactory-credentials'),
        string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', description: 'SSH credentials for deployment servers', defaultValue: 'ssh-deploy-key'),
        string(name: 'HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID', description: 'HTTP basic auth credentials (optional)', defaultValue: ''),
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', description: 'Restart service after deployment', defaultValue: true),
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', description: 'Service name to restart', defaultValue: 'app-service'),
        booleanParam(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK', description: 'Perform health check after deployment', defaultValue: true),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_URL', description: 'Health check endpoint (relative path)', defaultValue: '/health'),
        string(name: 'HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT', description: 'Health check timeout in seconds', defaultValue: '300'),
        booleanParam(name: 'ROLLBACK_ON_FAILURE', description: 'Rollback on deployment failure', defaultValue: true),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_USER', description: 'User for deployment', defaultValue: 'deployer'),
        string(name: 'FILE_PERMISSIONS', description: 'File permissions (octal)', defaultValue: '755'),
        booleanParam(name: 'EXTRACT_ARCHIVES', description: 'Extract archive files after download', defaultValue: true),
        booleanParam(name: 'PARALLEL_DEPLOYMENT', description: 'Deploy to servers in parallel', defaultValue: true),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT', description: 'Deployment timeout in minutes', defaultValue: '30'),
        booleanParam(name: 'DRY_RUN', description: 'Dry run mode (simulate deployment)', defaultValue: false)
    ])
])

def artifactUrls = []
def deploymentTargets = []
def checksumUrls = []
def downloadedArtifacts = [:]
def backupPaths = [:]
def deploymentResults = [:]

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    options {
        timeout(time: params.DEPLOYMENT_TIMEOUT.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        timestamps()
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS = "${WORKSPACE}/artifacts"
        WORKSPACE_CHECKSUMS = "${WORKSPACE}/checksums"
        DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP = sh(script: "date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S", returnStdout: true).trim()
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Pipeline Parameters ==="
                    
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URLS?.trim()) {
                        error("ARTIFACT_URLS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_TARGETS?.trim()) {
                        error("DEPLOYMENT_TARGETS parameter is required")
                    }
                    
                    artifactUrls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    deploymentTargets = params.DEPLOYMENT_TARGETS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                    
                    if (params.CHECKSUM_URLS?.trim()) {
                        checksumUrls = params.CHECKSUM_URLS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }
                        if (checksumUrls.size() != artifactUrls.size()) {
                            error("Number of checksum URLs must match number of artifact URLs")
                        }
                    }
                    
                    echo "Artifacts to download: ${artifactUrls.size()}"
                    echo "Deployment targets: ${deploymentTargets.size()}"
                    echo "Dry run mode: ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Preparing Workspace ==="
                    
                    sh """
                        mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}
                        mkdir -p ${WORKSPACE_CHECKSUMS}
                        rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/*
                        rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_CHECKSUMS}/*
                    """
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Downloading Artifacts ==="
                    
                    artifactUrls.eachWithIndex { url, index ->
                        echo "Downloading artifact ${index + 1}/${artifactUrls.size()}: ${url}"
                        
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        def localPath = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/${fileName}"
                        
                        downloadArtifact(url, localPath, index)
                        downloadedArtifacts[fileName] = localPath
                    }
                    
                    echo "Downloaded ${downloadedArtifacts.size()} artifacts successfully"
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Validate Checksums') {
            when {
                expression { params.VALIDATE_CHECKSUM && checksumUrls.size() > 0 }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Validating Artifact Checksums ==="
                    
                    checksumUrls.eachWithIndex { checksumUrl, index ->
                        def artifactUrl = artifactUrls[index]
                        def fileName = artifactUrl.tokenize('/').last()
                        def localPath = downloadedArtifacts[fileName]
                        
                        echo "Validating checksum for: ${fileName}"
                        
                        def checksumFile = "${WORKSPACE_CHECKSUMS}/${fileName}.checksum"
                        downloadArtifact(checksumUrl, checksumFile, index)
                        
                        def expectedChecksum = readFile(checksumFile).trim().split()[0]
                        def actualChecksum = calculateChecksum(localPath, params.CHECKSUM_ALGORITHM)
                        
                        if (expectedChecksum != actualChecksum) {
                            error("Checksum validation failed for ${fileName}\nExpected: ${expectedChecksum}\nActual: ${actualChecksum}")
                        }
                        
                        echo "Checksum validated successfully for ${fileName}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Extract Archives') {
            when {
                expression { params.EXTRACT_ARCHIVES && params.ARTIFACT_TYPE in ['zip', 'tar.gz'] }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Extracting Archive Files ==="
                    
                    downloadedArtifacts.each { fileName, localPath ->
                        echo "Extracting: ${fileName}"
                        
                        def extractDir = "${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}/extracted/${fileName.replaceAll(/\.(zip|tar\.gz)$/, '')}"
                        sh "mkdir -p ${extractDir}"
                        
                        if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'zip') {
                            sh "unzip -q ${localPath} -d ${extractDir}"
                        } else if (params.ARTIFACT_TYPE == 'tar.gz') {
                            sh "tar -xzf ${localPath} -C ${extractDir}"
                        }
                        
                        downloadedArtifacts[fileName] = extractDir
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Deploying to Production Servers ==="
                    
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "DRY RUN MODE - Simulating deployment"
                        deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                            echo "Would deploy to: ${target}"
                            deploymentResults[target] = [status: 'simulated', message: 'Dry run completed']
                        }
                        return
                    }
                    
                    if (params.PARALLEL_DEPLOYMENT && deploymentTargets.size() > 1) {
                        def deploymentSteps = [:]
                        
                        deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                            deploymentSteps[target] = {
                                deployToServer(target)
                            }
                        }
                        
                        parallel deploymentSteps
                    } else {
                        deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                            deployToServer(target)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Health Check') {
            when {
                expression { params.HEALTH_CHECK && !params.DRY_RUN }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Performing Health Checks ==="
                    
                    def timeout = params.HEALTH_CHECK_TIMEOUT.toInteger()
                    
                    deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                        if (deploymentResults[target]?.status == 'success') {
                            echo "Health check for: ${target}"
                            
                            def healthUrl = "http://${target}${params.HEALTH_CHECK_URL}"
                            def healthy = waitForHealthCheck(healthUrl, timeout)
                            
                            if (!healthy) {
                                deploymentResults[target].status = 'unhealthy'
                                deploymentResults[target].message = 'Health check failed'
                                
                                if (params.ROLLBACK_ON_FAILURE) {
                                    echo "Health check failed, initiating rollback for ${target}"
                                    rollbackDeployment(target)
                                }
                            } else {
                                echo "Health check passed for ${target}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Cleanup Backups') {
            when {
                expression { 
                    params.BACKUP_EXISTING && 
                    !params.DRY_RUN && 
                    deploymentResults.values().every { it.status == 'success' }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "=== Cleaning Up Old Backups ==="
                    
                    deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                        if (backupPaths[target]) {
                            sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                                sh """
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                                        find ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/backups -type d -mtime +7 -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
                                    '
                                """
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Completed Successfully ==="
                printDeploymentSummary()
            }
        }
        failure {
            script {
                echo "=== Deployment Failed ==="
                printDeploymentSummary()
                
                if (params.ROLLBACK_ON_FAILURE && !params.DRY_RUN) {
                    echo "Initiating rollback for all servers"
                    deploymentTargets.each { target ->
                        rollbackDeployment(target)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        always {
            script {
                echo "=== Cleaning Up Workspace ==="
                sh """
                    rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_ARTIFACTS}
                    rm -rf ${WORKSPACE_CHECKSUMS}
                """
            }
        }
    }
}

def downloadArtifact(String url, String localPath, int index) {
    try {
        if (url.startsWith('s3://')) {
            downloadFromS3(url, localPath)
        } else if (url.contains('artifactory')) {
            downloadFromArtifactory(url, localPath)
        } else if (url.startsWith('http://') || url.startsWith('https://')) {
            downloadFromHttp(url, localPath)
        } else {
            error("Unsupported URL scheme: ${url}")
        }
        
        sh "ls -lh ${localPath}"
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        error("Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${e.message}")
    }
}

def downloadFromS3(String s3Url, String localPath) {
    def s3Path = s3Url.replaceFirst('s3://', '')
    def bucket = params.S3_BUCKET ?: s3Path.split('/')[0]
    def key = s3Path.substring(bucket.length() + 1)
    
    withCredentials([[$class: 'AmazonWebServicesCredentialsBinding', 
                      credentialsId: params.AWS_CREDENTIALS_ID]]) {
        sh """
            aws s3 cp s3://${bucket}/${key} ${localPath}
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromArtifactory(String url, String localPath) {
    if (params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACTORY_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                                          usernameVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_USER',
                                          passwordVariable: 'ARTIFACTORY_PASS')]) {
            sh """
                curl -u \${ARTIFACTORY_USER}:\${ARTIFACTORY_PASS} -L -o ${localPath} "${url}"
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -L -o ${localPath} "${url}"
        """
    }
}

def downloadFromHttp(String url, String localPath) {
    if (params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID) {
        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.HTTP_CREDENTIALS_ID,
                                          usernameVariable: 'HTTP_USER',
                                          passwordVariable: 'HTTP_PASS')]) {
            sh """
                curl -u \${HTTP_USER}:\${HTTP_PASS} -L -o ${localPath} "${url}"
            """
        }
    } else {
        sh """
            curl -L -o ${localPath} "${url}"
        """
    }
}

def calculateChecksum(String filePath, String algorithm) {
    def cmd = ''
    switch (algorithm) {
        case 'SHA256':
            cmd = 'sha256sum'
            break
        case 'SHA1':
            cmd = 'sha1sum'
            break
        case 'MD5':
            cmd = 'md5sum'
            break
    }
    
    def checksum = sh(script: "${cmd} ${filePath} | awk '{print \$1}'", returnStdout: true).trim()
    return checksum
}

def deployToServer(String target) {
    try {
        echo "Deploying to server: ${target}"
        
        if (params.BACKUP_EXISTING) {
            createBackup(target)
        }
        
        deploymentResults[target] = [status: 'in-progress', message: 'Deploying artifacts']
        
        sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                    mkdir -p ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                '
            """
            
            downloadedArtifacts.each { fileName, localPath ->
                echo "Copying ${fileName} to ${target}"
                
                if (new File(localPath).isDirectory()) {
                    sh """
                        scp -r -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${localPath}/* ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target}:${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/
                    """
                } else {
                    sh """
                        scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${localPath} ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target}:${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/
                    """
                }
            }
            
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                    chmod -R ${params.FILE_PERMISSIONS} ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}
                '
            """
        }
        
        if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
            restartService(target)
        }
        
        deploymentResults[target] = [status: 'success', message: 'Deployment completed successfully']
        echo "Deployment to ${target} completed successfully"
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        deploymentResults[target] = [status: 'failed', message: e.message]
        error("Deployment to ${target} failed: ${e.message}")
    }
}

def createBackup(String target) {
    def backupDir = "${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/backups/backup_${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"
    backupPaths[target] = backupDir
    
    sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                mkdir -p ${backupDir}
                if [ -d ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH} ] && [ "\$(ls -A ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH} 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
                    cp -r ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/* ${backupDir}/ 2>/dev/null || true
                    echo "Backup created at ${backupDir}"
                else
                    echo "No existing files to backup"
                fi
            '
        """
    }
}

def rollbackDeployment(String target) {
    if (!backupPaths[target]) {
        echo "No backup available for ${target}, skipping rollback"
        return
    }
    
    try {
        echo "Rolling back deployment on ${target}"
        
        sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
            sh """
                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                    if [ -d ${backupPaths[target]} ]; then
                        rm -rf ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/*
                        cp -r ${backupPaths[target]}/* ${params.DEPLOYMENT_PATH}/
                        echo "Rollback completed from ${backupPaths[target]}"
                    else
                        echo "Backup directory not found, rollback failed"
                        exit 1
                    fi
                '
            """
        }
        
        if (params.RESTART_SERVICE) {
            restartService(target)
        }
        
        echo "Rollback completed successfully for ${target}"
        
    } catch (Exception e) {
        echo "Rollback failed for ${target}: ${e.message}"
    }
}

def restartService(String target) {
    echo "Restarting service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} on ${target}"
    
    sshagent([params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
        sh """
            ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${params.DEPLOYMENT_USER}@${target} '
                sudo systemctl restart ${params.SERVICE_NAME} || sudo service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} restart
                echo "Service ${params.SERVICE_NAME} restarted"
            '
        """
    }
    
    sleep(time: 5, unit: 'SECONDS')
}

def waitForHealthCheck(String healthUrl, int timeoutSeconds) {
    def startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
    def endTime = startTime + (timeoutSeconds * 1000)
    
    while (System.currentTimeMillis() < endTime) {
        try {
            def response = sh(script: "curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' ${healthUrl}", returnStdout: true).trim()
            
            if (response == '200') {
                echo "Health check passed: ${healthUrl}"
                return true
            }
            
            echo "Health check returned ${response}, retrying..."
            sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
            
        } catch (Exception e) {
            echo "Health check failed: ${e.message}, retrying..."
            sleep(time: 10, unit: 'SECONDS')
        }
    }
    
    echo "Health check timeout after ${timeoutSeconds} seconds"
    return false
}

def printDeploymentSummary() {
    echo "="*80
    echo "DEPLOYMENT SUMMARY"
    echo "="*80
    echo "Timestamp: ${DEPLOYMENT_TIMESTAMP}"
    echo "Artifacts Deployed: ${downloadedArtifacts.size()}"
    echo "Target Servers: ${deploymentTargets.size()}"
    echo ""
    echo "Deployment Results:"
    deploymentResults.each { server, result ->
        echo "  ${server}: ${result.status} - ${result.message}"
    }
    echo "="*80
}
